import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_to_end()
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let a_str = parts.get(0).ok_or("missing A")?
  let b_str = parts.get(1).ok_or("missing B")?
  let a = string.parse_int(a_str).ok_or("bad A")?
  let b = string.parse_int(b_str).ok_or("bad B")?
  let r = a * a + b * b
  print("r=#{r}")
  Ok(())
end
